rationale: verification_command: cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... && go test ./cmd/... && lefthook run pre-commit

No code changes were required for this bead in the current base revision.

Evidence:
- `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_post_review.go:111-126` charges reviewer `CostUSD` into the shared `ReviewCostCap` tracker and emits `review-cost-deferred` when the tracker trips.
- `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_post_review.go:185` and `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_post_review.go:209` use the same charge helper on the reviewer-error and approve paths.
- `cli/cmd/agent_cmd.go:1746-1771` builds the loop-wide cost accumulator, and `cli/cmd/agent_cmd.go:1919-1930` passes it into `ExecuteBeadLoopRuntime.ReviewCostCap`.
- `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go:1725-1729` defines the `ReviewCostDeferredEventBody` payload.
- `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_review_test.go:152-190` covers the normal-fit and deferral cases.
- `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_review_test.go:194-239` covers the reviewer-error charging path.

Result:
- The acceptance criteria are already satisfied in this revision.
- No follow-up implementation is needed unless the contract changes.
